hooks.command: r="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ ! -f "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then r=""; fi; if [ -z "$r" ]; then for d in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/litestar/*; do [ -f "$d/hooks/session-start.sh" ] && r="$d" && break; done; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -f ./hooks/session-start.sh ]; then r="."; fi; [ -n "$r" ] || exit 0; CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
hooks.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the Codex CLI session context.
